title: Scorecard Edit Modal Field Refinements
story: As a DataTools Pro user editing a Scorecard record, I want the edit modal fields to be accurate and consistent, so that I see the correct input types, labels, and only relevant fields.
description:
Several fields in the Scorecard edit modal needed cleanup for consistency and accuracy. This ticket addresses multiple small UX refinements to the modal form.

## Changes

1. **Source Data Extract** converted from a text input to a dropdown selector, with a corresponding URL field following the same pattern as other URL fields.
2. **SFDC Sink URL** field removed entirely — it was not needed.
3. **SFDC Sink Label** fixed to remove the erroneous "new" prefix.
4. **Data Mapping** field label updated to include "URL" for consistency with other URL-type fields.

## Prerequisite

MBT-118 (Remove Metric functionality from select.php) should be completed first, as some of these field changes overlap with the metric attribute cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Source Data Extract is rendered as a dropdown instead of a text input
A Source Data Extract URL field follows the same pattern as other URL fields
SFDC Sink URL field is removed from the edit modal
SFDC Sink Label no longer displays 'new' prefix
Data Mapping field label includes 'URL' for consistency
ux_changes: Source Data Extract changed from text input to dropdown. SFDC Sink URL field removed. SFDC Sink label corrected. Data Mapping label updated to include 'URL' for consistency.
middleware_changes: Server-side form rendering updated to output a dropdown for Source Data Extract and remove the SFDC Sink URL field. Label strings corrected.
implementation_notes: This ticket was recommended to be completed after MBT-118 since some of the field changes overlap with the metric attribute cleanup performed in that ticket.
comment_summary: Developer completed the changes and submitted for review without issues.
